name: Four Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium leek - white and pale green parts only, chopped
4 cups low-salt chicken stock or canned broth
recipeInstructions:
6 servings
1. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add leek and sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add stock and potato; bring to boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Puree the soup in batches using an immersion blender or food processor.
6. Return the purée to the saucepan.
7. Stir in half-and-half and bring to a gentle simmer.
(Soup can be prepared up to one day ahead. Cover and refrigerate; bring to simmer before continuing.)
8. Gradually add all cheeses, whisking until melted.
9. Ladle soup into bowls and sprinkle with croutons.
